metadata.description: Personal skills & agents, organized by domain.

plugins.name: ai-coding-discipline
plugins.description: Behavioral guidelines that reduce common LLM coding mistakes — surgical changes and fewer overcomplications.

plugins.name: bug-hunting
plugins.description: Whole-repo bug sweeps and systematic debugging — a fan-out of read-only hunters plus a root-cause debugger.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Thorough JavaScript/TypeScript/Python code review across bugs, security, and performance.

plugins.name: debugging
plugins.description: Systematic, root-cause-first debugging discipline for any codebase — investigate before editing, one hypothesis at a time, stop after three failed fixes.

plugins.name: mushilu-studio
plugins.description: End-to-end Mushilu-San-UI component pipeline — scope, spec, build, parallel review/audit, test, docs, and release — orchestrated as one workflow.

plugins.name: my-caveman
plugins.description: Caveman output compression — terse, telegraphic replies that cut output tokens while keeping full technical accuracy. Modes: lite, full, ultra, wenyan.

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: Audit, grade, and improve Claude Code skills and Cursor rules, and resolve overlap between them.

plugins.name: ponytail
plugins.description: Laziest-senior-dev coding discipline — YAGNI ladder, stdlib-first, native-platform-first, shortest working diff. Forces minimal code without cutting safety, validation, or accessibility.

plugins.name: ux-design
plugins.description: UI/UX design intelligence for web and mobile — accessibility, layout, typography, components, and data visualization.
